description: UpLead is a B2B contact database with verified emails, direct dials, and buyer intent, plus 50+ filters and real-time verification for accurate prospecting.
overview: UpLead gives sales teams a database of verified B2B contacts with real-time email verification, 50+ search filters, and buyer-intent data, integrating with CRMs and outreach tools.
what_is: UpLead is a B2B prospecting database built around data accuracy. It verifies emails in real time as you build a list, so reps spend less time on bounces and more on outreach, and it positions itself as a lower-cost alternative to the larger data providers.

It is strongest when you need targeted, verified contacts: filter by more than 50 criteria, pull emails, phone numbers, and intent signals, and export a clean list immediately. That makes it practical for focused prospecting from day one.

UpLead integrates with CRMs and outreach tools for enrichment and bulk lookups, sitting in the stack as a data source. It is not a marketing-automation or campaign-management platform; it stays focused on finding and verifying leads.
